Home Blog

OpenAI Launches New Agent Framework

OpenAI announced a new agent framework today, enabling developers to build autonomous AI systems with improved tool use and memory.

The framework includes built-in support for function calling, retrieval-augmented generation, and multi-step reasoning. Developers can create agents that interact with external APIs, databases, and file systems.

Early access is available through the API dashboard. Pricing starts at $0.01 per 1K tokens for input and $0.03 per 1K tokens for output.
